mapper.select: SELECT o.*, i.title AS item_title, b.nickname AS buyer_nickname, s.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM trade_order o LEFT JOIN item i ON o.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user b ON o.buyer_id = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON o.seller_id = s.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_order(item_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, status) VALUES(#{itemId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, i.title AS item_title, b.nickname AS buyer_nickname, s.nickname AS seller_nickname FROM trade_order o LEFT JOIN item i ON o.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN sys_user b ON o.buyer_id = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON o.seller_id = s.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{userId} OR o.seller_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trade_order WHERE buyer_id = #{userId} OR seller_id = #{userId}
